title: World Cup 2026 squad lists: England, Scotland, Brazil, USA, Spain, France, Germany, Netherlands, Argentina, Portugal and more
original_text: The squads are in for the 2026 World Cup as the countdown continues for this summer's tournament. The 48 national teams had to register a team of between 23 and 26 players, including three goalkeepers, by Tuesday June 2. Only players named in these squads will be eligible to take part, although they can be replaced by a player from the provisional squad in the event of a serious injury or illness, no later than 24 hours before their team's first match at the World Cup.
